title: Spuk im Schloß
actors: Margot Hielscher, Fritz Odemar, Albert Matterstock
plot: In the antique shop J.M. Mauritius, there's astonishment when a young, beautiful woman, Gabriele Euler, inquires about an old fortress crest, which can be seen in the background on an old tapestry - it's, in fact, the same crest e...
